AI 根本没有「减速」，只是减了「加速度」（二阶导）。
且「加速度」放缓的原因不是 AI 不行了，是人类不行了，准确来讲是人类的带宽已经完全跟不上了。
我们需要重新思考为什么要面对面说话沟通、为什么要聚会、为什么要一个人待着待会儿。
大多数人连基础的三段论都没掌握，还奢谈思考、洞察、推敲……你看看你大前提都错的没谱了，再想什么都是浪费脑细胞。

这类企业的痛感是真的，但解决方案是蠢的。10 个产品最后 10 个产品的 skill，100 个研发搞出来 100 种代码风格，最后混成一坨 AI 根本没法用。
美团蒸馏员工的第一天就搞出来几百个文档汇报 skill，质量一个比一个差；meta 花了大功夫又是监控鼠标又是装摄像头，最后训练出的玩意儿把员工的坏习惯也装进去了。
我现在正在开发一套根本性解决方案，企业能复用能力，员工也不会感到难受，甚至会发现自己更轻松——希望能在 7 月完成上线给大家看看。🤣

So deep. I completely agree that it’s time to rethink the relationship between AI and humans. AI shouldn’t just be a personal assistant or a coding assistant—it should become a real member of a productive team, learning, collaborating, and compounding knowledge alongside humans.

That’s exactly the problem I’m working on. I’m building a system around this vision and am currently raising funding. If this resonates with you and you’d like to learn more—or you’re interested in investing—I’d love to connect.

ChatGPT 5.6 looks like a coward. It asks for permissions for almost everything and you can't give it full permissions in settings. 
And it's always misunderstanding you when you ask it to do some real work. Instead of making things done, it prefers to write documents, tell reasons or what it "want" to do once and once again, until you use the F-word.
It's not good for coding efficiency.

研发不服的是傻鸟，不是学历。名校毕业出来坑研发、拿研发当垫脚石的混子产品我见多了。现在招聘卡学历纯是因为岗位少人多。
绝大多数 toC 的 AI 产品真的需要好好看一看小微，古法产品手艺还没失效！
3. 不放开通用的文件编辑、工作协作等复杂能力，避免用户深度探索造成与现有微信场景的对抗；小微是方便用微信，微信更好用，不是替代微信。
2. 通过开放小程序的自动接入 Skill，小微+搜索 自带了上百万种不同的能力，确保 10 亿用户想做的事都能做到；同时允许用户一句话创建小工具，用 小程序规范+原子组件 消耗极少 token 就能兜底个性化需求。
1. 小微是给微信用户中的 10 亿中老年人、小城市人、非互联网圈人做的产品，他们需要的是说一句话就能点咖啡、点外卖、记账、给某个人发消息这样的便利；技术圈子想实现的重度任务，他们自己会去用 codex 和 Claude，小微没必要讨好他们。

微信小微用三件事打赢 toC 决胜局：
1. 只做 10 亿用户的 AI 产品，不做 1000 万用户的 AI 产品
2. 充分利用存量小程序和小程序开发规范，拓宽能力范围
3. 聚焦微信场景，不做 AGI，不深挖能力边界
如果把视线聚焦在模型能力上，估计永远也不能明白为什么微信的小微这次又能成功；如果把视线聚焦在情感陪伴或者万能工具上，估计就又是一款像菜包一样的大规模赔钱产品。
微信团队的产品功力还是强。

Hi @ChatGPTapp  app team,

As a frequent user of the ChatGPT macOS app, I often work with very long conversations. I’d like to suggest adding an improved navigation feature that helps users quickly find the beginning of a long response.

I’ve also created a prototype to illustrate what I have in mind.

One possible design would be to add two buttons on the right side of the chat window. When users click the up button, the page could scroll to the previous user question, making it easier to find the beginning of the assistant’s response. Similarly, the down button could scroll to the next user question.

Thank you for considering my suggestion.

Hi @ChatGPTapp  app team,

I’m a user of the ChatGPT macOS app, and I often work on multiple tasks at the same time. I’d like to suggest adding a tabbed interface that makes it easier to switch between regular chats and chats within Projects.

Currently, I have to open several browser windows as a workaround because the app doesn’t support tabs yet. When I switch chats using the sidebar, the conversation reloads each time, and I often lose my place. I then have to scroll back up to find the paragraph I was reading.

I’ve also made a prototype to illustrate the idea. My suggestion is to build on the existing Pin to Top feature, so users could pin specific chats — including chats inside a Project — and have them appear as tabs for quick access.

Thank you for considering it!
